pages.text: $(bold)Mega Crimson Seed$()$(br2)A giant crimson stalk. From the 2x2 nether megaflora.
pages.title: Mega Crimson Seed

pages.text: $(bold)Grows:$() plant in a 2×2 to raise a giant crimson stalk.$(br2)$(bold)No conversion recipe$() — this seed falls only from a fully-grown mega crimson.
pages.title: Planting & Catalyst
